enforcement.enforcement_blocked_until: Gate A CLOSED (Postgres shadow persistence proven)
enforcement.note: In audit_only, permission checks record outcomes without denying mutations. In enforced, denials are mandatory server-side — blocked while Gate A is OPEN.

scope_rules.college_leader: May only act on events scoped to assigned college_slug(s).
scope_rules.county_leader: May only act on events scoped to assigned county_slug(s).
scope_rules.city_leader: May only act on events scoped to assigned city_slug(s); county review required before campaign.
scope_rules.candidate_private: Only candidate_scheduler (or explicit candidateScheduleAccess) may view private Kelly travel/security fields. Campaign Manager does NOT receive this by role alone.
scope_rules.publication: Publish/unpublish requires calendar.publication.publish — Campaign Manager / ACM by default.
scope_rules.volunteer_interest: Interest never grants confirmation. calendar.staffing.confirm_participant requires staffing authority.
scope_rules.separation_of_duties: Event proposer ≠ final campaign approver; candidate requester ≠ confirmer; volunteer ≠ self-confirmer.

denial_behavior.safe_message: You do not currently have permission to complete this action.

messages.generic: You do not currently have permission to complete this action.
messages.scope: This action belongs to a different College Community, county, city, or team.
messages.approval: This decision must be completed by an authorized reviewer.
messages.candidate_privacy: Candidate scheduling details are restricted to the scheduling team.
messages.publication: This event is not ready or authorized for public publication.
messages.staffing: Volunteer assignments must be confirmed by an authorized event or volunteer manager.
